case_title: NATALIE BARNHART et al VS. MISTI LAYNE

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED MAR-06-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAYNE, MISTI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-23-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE CASE IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING; DEFENDANT SHALL APPEAR TO PROVIDE FURTHER EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY CONCERNING HER EFFORTS TO SCHEDULE A REPLACEMENT CONTRACT OR OTHERWISE MITIGATE HER LOSS. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) (PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE TO REMAIN TOGETHER IN THE COURT FILE)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY BARNHART, NATALIE FAKHRY, JAD AS TO DEFENDANT LAYNE, MISTI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LAYNE, MISTI ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARNHART, NATALIE FAKHRY, JAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAYNE, MISTI $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,405.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAYNE, MISTI
